title: Cookable Rotten Flesh
description: Cookable Rotten Flesh Mod for Minecraft
body:
# Cookable Rotten Flesh
### Overview
Have you ever found yourself with an inventory full of rotten flesh and wished there was something more useful you could do with it? With the Cookable Rotten Flesh mod, now you can! Transform your unwanted rotten flesh into a more palatable, nutritious, and safe-to-eat alternative by cooking it in a furnace.

### Features
**Cook Rotten Flesh:** Simply place rotten flesh into a furnace, and you'll receive Cooked Flesh, a new food item.
**Rotten Flesh Block:** Crafted with 9 rotten flesh.
